mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_user_department where department_id=#{departmentId}
select department_id from sys_user_department where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_user_department where user_id in
#{userId}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_user_department(department_id, user_id, status, tenant_id) values
(#{item.departmentId},#{item.userId},#{item.status},#{item.tenantId})
mapper.update: update sys_user_department ud inner join sys_user u on u.user_id = ud.user_id set ud.tenant_id = u.customer_id where ud.user_id = #{userId} and (ud.tenant_id is null or ud.tenant_id = '') and u.customer_id is not null and trim(u.customer_id) != ''

update sys_user_department ud inner join fd_department d on d.id = ud.department_id set ud.tenant_id = d.tenant_id where ud.user_id = #{userId} and (ud.tenant_id is null or ud.tenant_id = '') and d.tenant_id is not null and trim(d.tenant_id) != ''

update sys_user_department ud inner join sys_user u on u.user_id = ud.user_id set ud.tenant_id = u.customer_id where (ud.tenant_id is null or ud.tenant_id = '') and u.customer_id is not null and trim(u.customer_id) != ''

update sys_user_department ud inner join fd_department d on d.id = ud.department_id set ud.tenant_id = d.tenant_id where (ud.tenant_id is null or ud.tenant_id = '') and d.tenant_id is not null and trim(d.tenant_id) != ''
